item.title: Version 1.4.5
item.description:
What's New in 1.4.5

  • Fixed: Sparkle auto-updates were not being offered due to incorrect build number and minimum OS version in the update feed

    • What's New in 1.4.3

  • Changed: Sparkle update checks now happen twice daily

    • What's New in 1.4.2

  • Fixed: "Claude window reset" notification firing on every refresh instead of only once when the window actually expires

    • What's New in 1.4.1

  • Fixed: "Not signed in" error appearing even after logging in when session cookies had expired in the background

    • What's New in 1.4

  • macOS Sequoia (15.0) support
  • Silent re-authentication — stale sessions recover automatically without prompting you to log in again
